headline: What JB Hunt Q1 Earnings Tells Us About Freight Recovery and Economic Resilience
summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ: JBHT) delivered a strong first quarter, posting per-share earnings of $1.49 against a consensus estimate of $1.45, while total operating revenue of $3.06 billion beat the $2.95 billion estimate and rose 4.62% year-over-year. The results signal a meaningful turn in freight market conditions after a prolonged industry downturn. Operating income ... headline: JB Hunt Earnings Help Trucking Stock Keep on Trucking
summary: Logistics is the lifeblood of the economy—and  J.B. Hunt Transport Services  is one of the largest logistics companies in the country, moving millions of loads each year.  The company’s first-quarter earnings report looked solid, sending JB Hunt Stock up 6.3% to $238.26 in early Thursday trading, a new all-time high, while the S&P 500 was down 0.2%.  J.B. Hunt reported $1.49 in earnings per share from sales of $3.1 billion on Wednesday.

headline: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Mark New Highs; These Truck Stocks Clear Entries (Live Coverage)
summary: The Nasdaq composite and other major indexes regained upward momentum Thursday, closing a seesaw session higher as Wall Street awaited a pending ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon.  Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing fell 3% on the stock market today following its earnings report but stayed near the high of its current base.  Meanwhile, data-center chip innovator Advanced Micro Devices broke out and rallied nearly 8% in heavy turnover.

content.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Mark New Highs; These Truck Stocks Clear Entries (Live Coverage)

Meanwhile, data-center chip innovator Advanced Micro Devices broke out and rallied nearly 8% in heavy turnover.
